title: narcissus elegans var. obsoletus
intro: Narcissus elegans var. obsoletus, also known as the Elegant Daffodil or Wild Narcissus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Narcissus elegans var. obsoletus include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
